Michael J. Bertinetti, Esq. of SEVERSON & WERSON 677-5534, for petitioner Citicapital Commercial Corp. dba First Collateral Services, moving to confirm arbitration award

RULING:
* The Court vacated its tentative ruling, calendaring error
** No other appearance on this matter. The Court granted PETITIONER CITICAPITAL COMMERCIAL CORPORATION'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award, no opposition filed. ORDER and judgment SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JLW/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
